description: Style Note This classic shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans and casual footwear. Product Details Purple striped shirt, has a spread collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care 100% combed cotton Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Relaxed fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 39
